title: elaborate.cc:1661: failed assertion prts[0]->unpacked_dimensions()==0
body:
Compilation of the following SystemVerilog module throws an assert:
```SystemVerilog
module a(input wire i1 [1:2]);
	assign i1 = '{'b1, 'b0};
endmodule: a

module b();
	wire w [1:2];
	a a_inst(.i1(w));
endmodule: b
```

Command:
```
iverilog -g2012 test.sv
```

Error output:
```
assert: elaborate.cc:1661: failed assertion prts[0]->unpacked_dimensions()==0
```

Expected behavior:
This module should be compiled or a human readable error should be printed.

This issue occurs in `Icarus Verilog version 13.0 (devel) (s20221226-572-gb74511974)`

Found by a [verilog model](https://github.com/DepTyCheck/verilog-model) using [deptycheck](https://github.com/buzden/deptycheck)
